Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.http.response.BasicHttpException

Packages that use BasicHttpException
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807.adapter
Adapters that build Problem beans from Juneau HTTP error types.
org.apache.juneau.http.response
Next-generation HTTP response types.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg
REST Method Argument Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter
REST Response Converters
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard
REST Guards
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart
REST HTTP Parts
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor
HTTP Response Processors
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive
Reactive-Streams return-type support for @RestOp handlers (opt-in, dependency-free).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing
Tracing SPI for juneau-rest-server — per-request span hook backed by a caller-supplied TracerHook bean.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.validation
Optional Jakarta Bean Validation 3.x integration for juneau-rest-server — declarative validation of request beans via jakarta.validation.constraints.* annotations.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.vars
Predefined SVL Variables
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.

  • Uses of BasicHttpException in org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807.adapter

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807.adapter with parameters of type BasicHttpException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Problem
    ProblemAdapters.fromException(BasicHttpException e)
    Builds a Problem from a BasicHttpException (or any subclass like NotFound, InternalServerError, etc).

  • Uses of BasicHttpException in org.apache.juneau.http.response

    Subclasses of BasicHttpException in org.apache.juneau.http.response
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BadGateway
    Represents an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error response.
    class 
    BadRequest
    Represents an HTTP 400 Bad Request error response.
    class 
    Conflict
    Represents an HTTP 409 Conflict error response.
    class 
    ExpectationFailed
    Represents an HTTP 417 Expectation Failed error response.
    class 
    FailedDependency
    Represents an HTTP 424 Failed Dependency error response.
    class 
    Forbidden
    Represents an HTTP 403 Forbidden error response.
    class 
    GatewayTimeout
    Represents an HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout error response.
    class 
    Gone
    Represents an HTTP 410 Gone error response.
    class 
    HttpVersionNotSupported
    Represents an HTTP 505 HTTP Version Not Supported error response.
    class 
    InsufficientStorage
    Represents an HTTP 507 Insufficient Storage error response.
    class 
    InternalServerError
    Represents an HTTP 500 Internal Server Error error response.
    class 
    LengthRequired
    Represents an HTTP 411 Length Required error response.
    class 
    Locked
    Represents an HTTP 423 Locked error response.
    class 
    LoopDetected
    Represents an HTTP 508 Loop Detected error response.
    class 
    MethodNotAllowed
    Represents an HTTP 405 Method Not Allowed error response.
    class 
    MisdirectedRequest
    Represents an HTTP 421 Misdirected Request error response.
    class 
    NetworkAuthenticationRequired
    Represents an HTTP 511 Network Authentication Required error response.
    class 
    NotAcceptable
    Represents an HTTP 406 Not Acceptable error response.
    class 
    NotExtended
    Represents an HTTP 510 Not Extended error response.
    class 
    NotFound
    Represents an HTTP 404 Not Found error response.
    class 
    NotImplemented
    Represents an HTTP 501 Not Implemented error response.
    class 
    PayloadTooLarge
    Represents an HTTP 413 Payload Too Large error response.
    class 
    PreconditionFailed
    Represents an HTTP 412 Precondition Failed error response.
    class 
    PreconditionRequired
    Represents an HTTP 428 Precondition Required error response.
    class 
    RangeNotSatisfiable
    Represents an HTTP 416 Range Not Satisfiable error response.
    class 
    RequestHeaderFieldsTooLarge
    Represents an HTTP 431 Request Header Fields Too Large error response.
    class 
    ServiceUnavailable
    Represents an HTTP 503 Service Unavailable error response.
    class 
    TooManyRequests
    Represents an HTTP 429 Too Many Requests error response.
    class 
    Unauthorized
    Represents an HTTP 401 Unauthorized error response.
    class 
    UnavailableForLegalReasons
    Represents an HTTP 451 Unavailable For Legal Reasons error response.
    class 
    UnprocessableEntity
    Represents an HTTP 422 Unprocessable Entity error response.
    class 
    UnsupportedMediaType
    Represents an HTTP 415 Unsupported Media Type error response.
    class 
    UpgradeRequired
    Represents an HTTP 426 Upgrade Required error response.
    class 
    UriTooLong
    Represents an HTTP 414 URI Too Long error response.
    class 
    VariantAlsoNegotiates
    Represents an HTTP 506 Variant Also Negotiates error response.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.addHeader(String name, String value)
    Appends a header to the end of the header list.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.addHeader(HttpHeader value)
    Appends a header to the end of the header list.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setBody(HttpBody value)
    Sets the response body.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setContent(String value)
    Sets the response body to a plain-text string body (UTF-8, text/plain).
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setContent(HttpBody value)
    Sets the response body.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setHeader(String name, String value)
    Sets a single header, replacing any existing header with the same name.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setHeader(HttpHeader value)
    Sets a single header, replacing any existing header with the same name.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setHeaders(List<HttpHeader> values)
    Replaces all headers with the given list.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setHeaders(HttpHeader... values)
    Replaces all headers with the given array.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setLocale(Locale value)
    Sets the locale associated with this response.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setProtocolVersion(HttpProtocolVersion value)
    Sets the protocol version, preserving the existing status code and reason phrase.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setReasonPhrase(String value)
    Sets the reason phrase, preserving the existing protocol version and status code.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setStatusCode(int value)
    Sets the status code, preserving the existing protocol version and reason phrase.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setStatusLine(HttpStatusLine value)
    Sets the status line.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setUnmodifiable()
    Latches this instance so that subsequent calls to mutating setters throw IllegalStateException.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<BasicHttpException>
    RestRequest.checkPreconditions(RestResponse response)
    Evaluates the conditional-request headers on this request against the response's currently-set ETag and Last-Modified values.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    RestContext.processResponse(RestOpSession opSession)
    The main method for serializing POJOs passed in through the RestResponse.setContent(Object) method or returned by the Java method.
    protected void
    RestContext.startCall(RestSession session)
    Called at the start of a request to invoke all RestStartCall methods on this context.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AuthenticationException
    Specialization of Unauthorized thrown by BearerTokenGuard, ApiKeyGuard, and user-supplied TokenValidator / ApiKeyStore implementations to signal AuthN failure.

    ValidationException
